title: V8 Battery, 21.6V Lithium Replacement Battery for Dyson SV10 Compatible for V8 Animal Absolute Motorhead Fluffy Cordless Vacuum Cleaner 215681
features: 【Fully compatible design】 Designed for Dyson V8 All models, widely used in V8 Absolute vacuum cleaner, V8 Animal vacuum cleaner, V8 Fluffy vacuum cleaner, V8 Motorhead vacuum cleaner, V8 handheld series vacuum cleaner, V8 SV10 vacuum cleaner, V8 Animal cordless upright vacuum cleaner, V8 Cord-free, V8 Trigger, V8 Matress, V8 Matress, V8 Carbon Afibre, V8 Slim series.

【Fully Realistic Capacity】 Actual capacity 4500mAh V8 replacement battery, lithium-ion battery. Made with premium batteries for Dyson V8 series vacuum cleaners, the service life is more than 2 times higher than the original battery. Ensure extended V8 vacuum cleaner operation time and stable performance, allowing you to clean more efficiently without frequent charging.

【Intelligent Protection】 REACELL V8 batteries are made of high-quality imported lithium batteries and meet FCC RoHS safety test standards. Built-in multiple circuit protection (overcharge, short circuit, high temperature and overcurrent protection) and fireproof structure, no memory effect, almost no self-discharge, the battery can be charged and discharged up to 1300+ times.

【Easy to install】 REACELL V8 battery has the same size and function as the original battery. The battery is easy to install and has a user-friendly design for quick replacement. Simply remove the old battery and replace it with a new one, and the vacuum cleaner will work without interruption (Note: Do not charge the battery immediately after it is exhausted. Let the battery cool for 10-20 minutes before charging).
【After-sales Service】 Provide 30-day refund, 100-day return and exchange, 24-hour online service. If you have any questions, you can contact us at any time.
